message:
🌱 Add argo-workflows: Role-based Access Controls for SSO mission (#741)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-workflows-3525-role-based-access-controls-for-sso",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-workflows: Role-based Access Controls for SSO",
+    "description": "Role-based Access Controls for SSO. Requested by 72+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-workflows deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-workflows version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nhelm list -n argo-workflows 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-workflows installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-workflows configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows\n```\nCurrently any user that logs in using SSO escalates to the `argo-server` service account. We would like other options."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Role-based Access Controls for SSO",
+        "description": "Configure RBAC for SSO using Casbin policy in the workflow-controller-configmap. This treats the URL as the object and the HTTP method as the action.\n```yaml\n[request_definition]\nr = sub, obj, act\n\n[policy_definition]\np = sub, obj, act\n\n[policy_effect]\ne = some(where (p.eft == allow))\n\n[matchers]\nm = r.sub == p.sub && keyMatch(r.obj, p.obj) && (r.act == p.act || p.act == \"*\")\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nkubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Role-based Access Controls for SSO\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Implemented RBAC for SSO using Casbin. The URL is treated as the object and HTTP method as the action. Users can configure rules in the workflow-controller-configmap to map SSO groups to service accounts.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "[request_definition]\nr = sub, obj, act\n\n[policy_definition]\np = sub, obj, act\n\n[policy_effect]\ne = some(where (p.eft == allow))\n\n[matchers]\nm = r.sub == p.sub && keyMatch(r.obj, p.obj) && (r.act == p.act || p.act == \"*\")",
+        "kind: ConfigMap\nmetadata:\n  name: workflow-controller-configmap\ndata:\n  rbac: \n    # to configure the default account to use:\n    defaultServiceAccount: my-sa\n    # use the first matching rule\n    rules:\n    - groups: \n        anyOf:\n        - my-oidc-group\n       serviceAccount:\n         name: my-sa",
+        "argo version\nargo: v3.4.0\n  BuildDate: 2022-09-15T21:56:10Z\n  GitTreeState: clean\n  GoVersion: go1.18\n  Compiler: gc\n  Platform: linux/amd64"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-workflows",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-workflows"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/issues/3525",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/pull/3594"
+    },
+    "reactions": 72,
+    "comments": 25,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "argo"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:19:08.542Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
